  • Constructor Details

    • Map

      public Map(int height, int widht, Player p, int x, int y, Structure[] struct) throws NotAllowedSizeException, OutOfMapException, PlayerNullException
      Constructor of Map, it create a map with a widht and a height defined in the parameter. The wall are included in the widht and the height. The function also take a player that is placed at a (x,y) position defined in the parameters
      Parameters:
      widht - widht of the map, each unit equal one ascii character
      height - height of the map, each unit equal one ascii character
      p - Player that you want to put on the map
      x - x position that the player will have at the beginning of the game
      y - y position that the player will have at the beginning of the game
      structCoord - array of the different coordonate of the structure loaded in the map
      struct - array of the structure loaded in the map
      Throws:
      NotAllowedSizeException - If the widht or the height is less or equal to 2.
      OutOfMapException - If the coordonate (x,y) are on or out of the map's walls
      PlayerNullException - If a player passed in argument is null this exception is raised.

  • Method Details

    • loadMap

      public static Map loadMap(String path)
      Method that load a map with structure and player position from a file passed in argument
      Parameters:
      path - string value of the relative path of the save file. The path start a the project's root directory

    • display

      public void display()
      Function that display the map and the entity in it. It also print at the end the player in it with his score and coordonate

    • isInLevel

      public boolean isInLevel(Structure struct)
      Method that return true if a structure can be placed on the coordonate indicated
      Returns:
      boolean that return true if the aera is available

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Redefinition of the Map toString methode, now print name : score pt(s) | x y positions of the player in the map.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • getHeight

      public int getHeight()
      Method that return the height of the map
      Returns:
      integer that is the height of the map

    • getWidht

      public int getWidht()
      Method that return the widht of the map
      Returns:
      integer that is the widht of the map

    • collisionDetector

      public boolean collisionDetector(int x, int y)
      Function that return False if a coordonate is not appropriate /!\ important to enter first the x coordonate and then the y coordonate
      Parameters:
      x - x coordonate of the player you want to test
      y - y coordonate of the player you want to test
      Returns:
      return a boolean true if the case is available else false

    • movePlayer

      public void movePlayer(Move m)
      Function that change the coordonate of the player on the map if the case is available
      Parameters:
      m - Decide in which direction you want to go
